full_text:
Du Kui (Gongliang) 杜夔 (公良)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du Kui (杜夔), styledGongliang (公良), was born in Henan. Gentleman of the Court Music. Reprimanded Liu Biao for creating an orchestra for his court. Du Kui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Liu Biao, and the Wei Kingdom.
